metadata.title: Terms of Service — Rules & Guidelines | Fancy Toolbox
metadata.description: Read the Terms of Service for Fancy Toolbox. By using our free online tools, you agree to these guidelines. Tools provided 'as is' without warranty.
metadata.keywords: terms of service, terms and conditions, user agreement, fancy toolbox terms

sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using Fancy Toolbox, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.heading: Use of Service
sections.body: Our tools are provided for lawful purposes only. You agree not to misuse the services for any illegal or unauthorized purpose. All tools are provided 'as is' without any warranty.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: The content, design, and code of Fancy Toolbox are owned by us and protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our prior written consent.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: Fancy Toolbox and its creators shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use our services. We make no guarantees about the accuracy, reliability, or availability of the tools.

sections.heading: Changes to Terms
sections.body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
